actions.name: create_record

data.description: 1-100 raw Zoho Bigin field-API-name-keyed record objects to insert into config.module_name (e.g. [{"Deal_Name": "New Deal"}] for the default Deals module; Zoho Bigin itself enforces the 100-record-per-call cap and each module's own mandatory-field set server-side, e.g. Deal_Name for Deals/Pipelines, Last_Name for Contacts -- the engine's draft-07 subset has no minItems/maxItems keyword to enforce cardinality here, see docs.md Known limits).

trigger.description: Optional workflow trigger allow-list; an empty array suppresses all workflow execution for this insert.

actions.risk: creates one or more new records in config.module_name; external mutation, approval required

actions.name: update_record

data.description: 1-100 raw record objects to update in config.module_name, each carrying its existing "id" plus any fields to change; fields omitted from a record are left unmodified server-side.

actions.risk: overwrites the named fields of one or more existing records in config.module_name; external mutation, approval required

actions.name: upsert_record

data.description: 1-100 raw record objects to upsert into config.module_name.

duplicate_check_fields.description: Field API names used to detect an existing record; when omitted, Zoho Bigin checks its own system/user-defined unique fields for config.module_name.

actions.risk: inserts a new record in config.module_name if no match is found on duplicate_check_fields, otherwise overwrites the matched existing record's submitted fields; external mutation, approval required

actions.name: delete_record
actions.risk: permanently deletes a single record from config.module_name; external mutation, approval required

actions.name: create_note

parent_id.description: ID of the config.module_name record this note attaches to.

data.description: 1-100 note objects to create against parent_id.

actions.risk: attaches one or more notes to an existing record in config.module_name; low-risk external mutation, no approval required

actions.name: delete_note
actions.risk: permanently deletes a single note from a record in config.module_name; external mutation, approval required
